parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "llama-3.3-70b-versatile", temperature: 0.1, messages: [ { role: "user", content: "Classify this ecommerce product review. Return ONLY a JSON object, no other text, in this exact shape: {\"sentiment\": \"positive\" or \"negative\" or \"neutral\", \"theme\": \"<one of: Sizing/Fit, Quality, Shipping, Price, Customer Service, Packaging, Other>\", \"confidence\": <0 to 1>}.\n\nReview: " + $json.reviewText } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "llama-3.3-70b-versatile", temperature: 0.3, messages: [ { role: "user", content: "You are an ecommerce customer experience analyst. Below are the top review themes ranked by impact (volume plus share of negative sentiment). For EACH theme listed, write ONE concrete, specific corrective action -- no vague advice like monitor the situation or improve quality. Reference the theme name explicitly. Also write a 2-sentence executive summary.

THEMES:
" + $json.rankedThemes.slice(0,3).map(t => t.theme + ' -- ' + t.count + ' reviews, ' + Math.round(t.negativeShare*100) + '% negative, priority score ' + t.priorityScore + '. Example complaints: ' + (t.examples.join(' | ') || 'none negative yet')).join('
') + "

Return your answer in exactly this format:
SUMMARY: <executive summary>
RECOMMENDATION FOR <theme name>: <action>
(repeat the RECOMMENDATION FOR line once per theme listed above)" } ] }) }}
